title: 🪼 Jellyfish
description: Optimization and Enhancement combined with speed and ease of use
body:
![Jellyfish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b89493ea5d2ba921dd7fc334f0894fe0f1181fd2.png)
# Introduce
Have you ever imagined that your old computer would be able to run Minecraft at 80~100+ fps? Well, now it's real!
Using Jellyfish, you can experience incredible pleasure while playing your favorite game. The modpack optimizes your game, and also slightly visually updates it.
> If you don't want visual modifications, try [Bromum](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bromum), there is nothing extra, only game optimization

# Why Jellyfish?
The goal of Jellyfish is to help players launch Minecraft with incredible speed and ease, as well as comfortably play without lags and with support for only useful Optifine features. In order not to clutter your settings, useless Optifine features will not be included in the modpack.
> For launchers that don't support the .mrpack file format, I provide zip files for mods and config files on my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/2TRCbjzdmh) and the .zip archive will also be attached as an additional file on the modrinth downloads page.
# Works everywhere
Jellyfish doesn't add any additional content to the game, allowing for compatibility with most any world or server.
# Support and Issues
If you have an error or just need help, contact my [discord server](https://discord.gg/2TRCbjzdmh). There I will help you and tell you how to fix various problems

**It is recommended to play with a licensed copy of the Minecraft Java game!**
### Start playing with Jellyfish now, optimize your game and enjoy the gaming process like never before!
![FPS Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07a83a1231aa54810fffe2e77d649c5e1cb618ea.png)

> Special thanks to **Simply Optimized** for their optimization configs.
